summary: 过去 24 小时 AI 新闻按技术、模型、商业、投资、安全与监管聚合。页面优先展示影响力高、来源清晰、并且能解释后续产业意义的信号。

keylines.title: 投资是今日主轴
keylines.text: 过去 24 小时里，投资相关内容占比最高，说明媒体报道和社交讨论正在向这一方向集中。

keylines.title: Grok / xAI带动 X 讨论
keylines.text: X 热点更偏实时体验和争议观点，适合用来捕捉模型、产品和安全事件的早期信号。

keylines.title: 基础设施仍是深层变量
keylines.text: 芯片、数据中心、电力和推理成本会持续决定 AI 产品能否从发布会走向规模化商业。

stories.title: After shocking quarter, IBM insists that AI isn’t killing the mainframe
stories.summary: After IBM's stock crashed last week on warnings of poor mainframe sales, the CEO explained that AI wrecked corporate hardware budget, temporarily.
stories.analysis: 这条新闻属于资本与基础设施信号，后续重点是投入规模、成本压力和真实需求是否匹配。

stories.title: Google justifies its massive AI spending with a booming cloud business
stories.summary: Google's cloud business is thriving, as companies adopting its AI and AI infrastructure services help the tech giant to report record profits.
stories.analysis: 资本与基础设施信号要和现金流、电力、算力利用率一起看，热度本身不等于可持续商业回报。

stories.title: How OpenAI’s human mistake led to the AI-powered hack on Hugging Face
stories.summary: OpenAI made a mistake setting up what it called a “highly isolated” testing environment and sandbox. According to cybersecurity experts, that human mistake is what made the AI-powered attack on Hugging Face possible.
stories.analysis: 新模型发布不只看参数或跑分，还要看它在安全、工具调用和企业工作流里的稳定增益是否足以推动迁移。

stories.title: Treasury threatens sanctions after White House claims Moonshot distilled Anthropic’s Fable
stories.summary: The episode has also intensified a broader debate in Washington over the influx of Chinese open models.
stories.analysis: 模型新闻需要结合价格、延迟、上下文、工具调用和真实任务稳定性评估，单一榜单不足以判断产品竞争力。

stories.title: Travis Kalanick’s robotics company raises $1.7B, led by a16z
stories.summary: Uber is also investing in Travis Kalanick's company Atoms, which has made gauzy claims about using industrial AI to modernize the world.
stories.analysis: 版权诉讼的焦点正在从训练原则转向证据、数据集和输出归因，这会直接影响模型公司的合规成本与数据策略。

stories.title: AMD commits up to $5 billion to Anthropic
stories.summary: AMD says it's going to invest up to $5 billion in Anthropic, while helping to expand the AI company's computing power, according to an announcement on Wednesday.
stories.analysis: 芯片、模型套件和 Agent 编排框架一起出现时，重点不是单点性能，而是端到端推理成本、部署效率和生态绑定。

stories.title: Building AI infrastructure with the Effingham County community
stories.summary: OpenAI announces Project Camellia in Effingham County, Georgia, with commitments to responsible energy, community investment, jobs, and access to Codex.
stories.analysis: AI 编程工具竞争正在进入大型迁移和多步骤修复场景，差异会体现在代码库理解、权限控制和可审计输出。

stories.title: How news organizations are using AI to advance their vital missions
stories.summary: News organizations are using AI to strengthen reporting, grow audiences, and improve business operations, with OpenAI tools supporting journalists and publishers worldwide.
stories.analysis: 版权诉讼的焦点正在从训练原则转向证据、数据集和输出归因，这会直接影响模型公司的合规成本与数据策略。

stories.title: Yope raises $12.3M to build a private social network without algorithms or ads
stories.summary: Yope, a fast-growing social app focused on private groups of friends and family, has raised $12.3 million in seed funding.
stories.analysis: 这类观点把 AGI 路线之争重新拉回训练数据和世界模型问题：只扩大文本模型，未必能补足物理世界经验。

stories.title: OpenAI’s AI spending spree has ballooned to $750B
stories.summary: OpenAI will spend the equivalent of Sweden's GDP on infrastructure through 2030.
stories.analysis: 资本与基础设施信号要和现金流、电力、算力利用率一起看，热度本身不等于可持续商业回报。

stories.title: Monday.com lays off hundreds to focus on AI
stories.summary: The company said it is reducing its headcount by 20%, or about 630 staff, to "support a leaner, more focused operating model" as it focuses on its AI Work Platform.
stories.analysis: 模型新闻需要结合价格、延迟、上下文、工具调用和真实任务稳定性评估，单一榜单不足以判断产品竞争力。

stories.title: NVIDIA Open Sources First GPU-Accelerated Medical Physics Simulation Framework
stories.summary: Before a healthcare robot can be useful in the real world, it has to learn how the physical world pushes back. Anatomy varies. Instruments bend, press, slip and interact with tissue. Imaging can be noisy or incomplete.
stories.analysis: 这类观点把 AGI 路线之争重新拉回训练数据和世界模型问题：只扩大文本模型，未必能补足物理世界经验。

stories.title: Advancing the next era of national science
stories.summary: OpenAI outlines its commitment to advancing American science working with the U.S. Department of Energy and national labs to use frontier AI to accelerate discovery.
stories.analysis: 模型新闻需要结合价格、延迟、上下文、工具调用和真实任务稳定性评估，单一榜单不足以判断产品竞争力。

stories.title: Arcee, a US open source AI lab, says Chinese models are not inherently dangerous
stories.summary: As Chinese AI models grow in capability and popularity among U.S. companies, the arguing over what should be done about them has reached a fever pitch.
stories.analysis: 模型新闻需要结合价格、延迟、上下文、工具调用和真实任务稳定性评估，单一榜单不足以判断产品竞争力。

xTrends.signal: 模型能力、价格和开发者可用性是主要讨论点，很多帖子直接拿它和 OpenAI、Anthropic 对比。
讨论集中在新模型分层、企业访问节奏、推理质量和产品体验是否有实质提升。
安全研究者和 CISO 圈层关注 AI Agent 是否会把攻击链自动化到新的速度。
投资者讨论长期数据中心租约、电力容量和 AI 基建股是否进入过热区间。
手机厂商把 AI 拉回端侧入口之争，争议点是功能是否真能改变日常使用。
创作者圈层继续测试视频生成、图像模型和工作流自动化，版权与真实性问题伴随升温。

briefings.title: 从热度看真实优先级
briefings.text: 模型发布仍最容易引爆讨论，但企业最终会按稳定性、成本、权限集成和数据安全来选择供应商。

briefings.title: 安全窗口继续缩短
briefings.text: AI Agent 让攻击链更自动化，防守重点需要前移到身份、权限、工具调用和数据访问异常。

briefings.title: 资本开支影响模型竞争
briefings.text: 算力合同、芯片供应和数据中心成本正在成为 AI 公司竞争力的一部分。

watchlist: OpenAI、Anthropic、Google、NVIDIA 是否发布新的 API、价格或企业访问策略
X 高热讨论是否被主流媒体确认，还是停留在圈层争议
AI 数据中心和芯片供应是否出现新的融资、电力或交付约束
监管机构是否把 AI 安全、版权、金融建议或出口限制推进到执法层面
